import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const tabOrder=['all','students','alumni','admins'];const labelForTab=tab=>{if(tab==='all')return'All';if(tab==='students')return'Students';if(tab==='alumni')return'Alumni';if(tab==='admins')return'Admins';return tab;};const UserFilterTabs=_ref=>{let{activeTab,onTabChange}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-1 bg-white",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex flex-wrap gap-2",children:tabOrder.map(tab=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>onTabChange(tab),className:`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition
              ${activeTab===tab?'bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-sm':'bg-transparent text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100'}`,children:labelForTab(tab)},tab))})});};export default UserFilterTabs;
